provenance.cross_check: The PSR and MinTRL approximation follows the Bailey and Lopez de Prado finite-sample Sharpe framework summarized in the local wiki. Black-Scholes call/put values are standard closed-form reference values. DSR is cited as a required search-aware report metric, but is not a runtime anchor because the shared kernel does not yet expose a DSR calculation.

conventions.sharpe: mean divided by population standard deviation; no annualization factor
conventions.kurtosis: raw Pearson population kurtosis, not excess kurtosis; the generalized Sharpe variance formula subtracts 1 internally
conventions.expected_shortfall: arithmetic mean of the worst ceil(N * (1 - confidence)) observations
